{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322033900598C4E2A66F1EF1986C4"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7619739957026407192","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很遗憾[快哭了]
虽然作者首发对话体，但是读者认为作者写的对话太多，在水文，并且列举了良好的写作指导。
作者决定暂时不写了[送心]但是，发出来的世界存稿均完结。
大概都是周末吧，作者她不止一次遇见这种情况了。
我在番茄写同人的时候就担心这种事发生，还好读者少，来的读者素质较高，没骂我，只有一个职业差评的。
作者她现生很忙，毕业季，每天都被……然后改文，没心力了。
她挨个和读者道歉、说明原因，我替她在这里发个声明。
谢谢大家[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1774112712,"group_id":"7613678496925109272","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"385279960033754"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7613678496925109272","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"37"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6106,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7617117116149367577","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"段评作者看不见。
